name: proposal
description: A product or architecture decision that needs review

name: triaged
description: Scope and next action have been confirmed

name: needs-info
description: More information is required before work can continue

name: prio:p0
description: Critical: release, security, or severe user impact

name: prio:p1
description: High: significant impact and near-term work

name: area:host
description: Host service, protocol, or OMP integration

name: security
description: Security-sensitive work; do not disclose vulnerabilities publicly
